instruction: Leave the bathroom.  Go through the door straight across the hall walk straight through the kitchen.  Turn left at the end of the bar turn left again and go in the room to the right stand in between the closet and the sink.

text: I'm taking a moment to observe what's happening in the environment.

This confirms the heading interpretation is working correctly. So the left label actually corresponds to heading H+90 (turn left 90°), not H+270—I was overcomplicating it. The standard four-direction split is: ahead at H+0, right at H-90, behind at H+180, and left at H+90. My empirical test confirmed this: turning right 90° matched the right label image, so the formula holds.
